lines.text: Rachel's Hospital Room, Ross is sitting next to Rachel.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You said you'd marry Joey?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay you have to realize, I was exhausted, I was emotional, I would have said yes to anybody. Like that time you and I got married! (Pause) I'm not helping.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So you said yes to him, and you just had our baby?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That is right and traditionally the daddy is supposed to give the mummy a present but I am prepared to let that go.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So when I came in here to see if you wanted to maybe start things up again, you were engaged to my best friend.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well-Really? I thought Chandler was your best friend.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, Chandler's my oldest friend, but Joey's my-No! Ah! (points at Rachel)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ooooo!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (Enters) Hey you guys I'm gonna take off. I just wanted to let you guys know, say goodbye.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rachel said she'd marry you?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (He looks around the room) This isn't the right room, sorry folks. (leaves)
Opening Credits
Ross and Rachel's, Monica, Phoebe, Joey and Chandler are waiting for Ross and Rachel to come home and Monica is looking at the sign Phoebe bought that says, "It's a Boy!"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok, I don't wanna be negative so I'll say that most of the signs you bought are good.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No they ran out of "It's a girl" but I can fix this one, (She writes "not" in between it's and a) See?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looking at Chandler sleeping with a balloon in his mouth) So sexy. (Waking him up.) Honey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yea yea. (Pulls the balloon out of his mouth)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Honey why don't you go lie down.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, no, Ross and Rachel will be back soon and then I gotta go to the office (Pulls another balloon out of his mouth) Am I producing them?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why're you so tired?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Couldn't sleep last night you know, then I started worrying about this big divisional meeting that I have later today, the more I worried about it the more I couldn't sleep.  Y'know? I was like, if I fall asleep now I'll get six hours sleep, but if I fall asleep now I'll get five hours sleep. Not matter what I did I couldn't fall asleep.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You know what you should've done, you should have told yourself that little story.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (enters with Emma) Hi!

lines.speaker: Everyone
lines.text: Hi, welcome home!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe did the signs!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh you guys thanks for doing this.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Look at all the stuff people sent!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Ah! (Sees a big stuffed gorilla) Oh my gosh there's something every mother needs, a giant stuffed gorilla that takes up the entire apartment! What are people think... (Reads the card) Oh you guys I love it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey so where's Ross?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He's downstairs getting the rest of the stuff out of the cab.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Is he still mad at us?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, you more then me, but he can't stay to mad at me. I mean, I just had his baby.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's not fair! I can't do that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I'm not so sure you should be here when he comes up.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: See this is what I was afraid of, I didn't think I should be here either but somebody (Looks at Chandler) said he'd be over it by now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, what do I know? I wanted to get a bigger gorilla.
A Boardroom, Chandler keeps drifting off to sleep at his meeting.

lines.speaker: Ms. McKenna
lines.text: The numbers we are seeing New York, Chicago, and London are consistently solid, but many of our officers have reported disappointing fields.
Chandler drifts off and his arm slips off the table and he wakes back up.

lines.speaker: Ms. McKenna
lines.text: Boston is down, Atlanta is down, Houston is down, I could go on and on but instead of boring you I'll go straight to my forty two point plan.
Chandler leans over to fall asleep on the man's shoulder next to him, only the man catches his attempt.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Walter (nods).
Ross and Rachel's, Phoebe, Monica, Ross, and Rachel are watching Emma sleep.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: She's just so cute! I just wanna bite her ear off and use it and a sucking candy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe! But I could take one of those little feet and put it in a pita pocket.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (enters from the bed room) Okay I put most of the stuff away.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh great, the pacifiers?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: In the closet.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: The burping clogs?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Linen closet.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: The diapers?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: In the hospital.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wow you guys got a hospital?  Fancy!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No I left the diapers at the hospital! There's some in the bag but I'll run out and get some more.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright thanks, oh Ross could you stop by the coffee house and get me a muffin?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sure what kind?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Umm let me think...What do I want, what d-o I w-a-n-t...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Please take your time, it's an important decision. Not like, say, I know! deciding to marry someone, this is about a muffin.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Blueberry.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Blueberry it is.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow, he's really not letting this go, is he?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: God how long do you think that's gonna last?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I dunno, well he got over the "We were on a break" thing really quickly.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know I can't even worry about that right now, cause I got the cutie little baby, oh I can't believe how much I love her, I can't get enough of her, like right now I miss her.  I actually miss her.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know that's... that's her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh god look at her sleeping.  Oh, I love her so much!  Oh, I think I'm gonna wake her up.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no, Rach, no no, you know you're never supposed to wake a sleeping baby.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well I can do whatever I want!  I made her! (Waking Emma up.) Come on little girl, hi!
Emma starts crying

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can say I told you so but she's kinda doing that for me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh I'm sorry mummy's so sorry go back to sleep go back to sleep. Shh.   Shhh! Go back to sleep
Emma continues crying in the background

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Breaks your heart doesn't it

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It really does... how long do you think we have to stay?
A Boardroom, Chandler's meeting continues.

lines.speaker: Ms. McKenna
lines.text: Ok if everyone's on board, it's settled, Chandler, (Walter puts his hand on Chandlers hand, Chandler sleeping puts his hand on top of his, he then wakes up and pulls his hand away) Chandler?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: Ms. McKenna
lines.text: Are you on board?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (not knowing what he's saying yes to) Yes.

lines.speaker: Ms. McKenna
lines.text: Then, problem solved. Chandler will be running our office in Tulsa. You're gonna love Oklahoma.
Chandler smiles and nods then realizes what he's agreed to.
Ross and Rachel's, Emma continues crying while Rachel, Monica and Phoebe try different methods to stop her crying.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, alright, we already tried feeding her, changing her, burping her, oh try this one! Go back in time and listen to Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Alright here's something, it says to try holding the baby close to your body and then swing her rapidly from side to side.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok. (Starts swinging Emma rapidly and she stops crying)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It worked!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh (happy) oh no just stopped to throw up a little bit. (Emma starts crying again.) Oh come on, what am I gonna do, its been hours and it won't stop crying.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Umm, she Rach, not it, she.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I'm not so sure.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my god, I am losing my mind.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, no kidding, this just proves no good can come from having sex with Ross!
Central Perk, Ross is getting Rachel's muffin.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Gunther, can I get a couple of blueberry muffins to go? (He puts a bag with diapers in it on the counter.)

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Diapers huh?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: So I guess Rachel had you baby?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yep, can you believe it?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Nope!  I still can't believe she slept with you in the first place.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Huh? Ooh (laughs) you mean like a... Huh?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey. (Ross turns to see who it is, and seeing it's Joey he just ignores him and turns back around.) Ross, I know you're pissed at me, but we have to talk about this.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah actually we don't. (Ross walks off)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Fine, fine okay.  But I gotta say technically, I didn't even do anything wrong.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (turns back) What! (Angrily) You didn't do anything wrong?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I said I didn't technically.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay let's put aside that you (Makes quote marks with his fingers.) "accidentally" picked up my grandmothers ring and you (Does it again) "accidentally" proposed to Rachel.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, can I just stop you right there for a second? When people do this (Makes quote marks with his fingers.) I don't really know what that means. (Ross just looks at him) You were saying?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And I can even understand that you couldn't tell Rachel, but why couldn't you tell me, huh? You had all day to and you didn't.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know I should've. (Makes quote marks again.) "I'm sorry."

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Not using it right, Joe.
He brings his hands in closer to his face then does it again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm gonna go.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, come on Ross! (He grabs his bag so he can't leave) Look, Ross, we have to get past this.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Give me the bag.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, look, I don't know what else to do. I said I'm sorry!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You should scream at me, or-or-or curse me, or hit me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm not gonna hit you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why not?  You'll feel better!  I'll feel better, and you know you want to. I can see it in your eyes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No I don't.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: A little bit.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Little bit.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (excited) A little bit more.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Give me the bag.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, hit me

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Give me the bag.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hit me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey, give me the bag.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hit me!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joe I'm not kidding...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (interrupting) Hit me, hit me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (shouts) Hit me! Hit me!
Ross throws a punch, but Joey ducks and Ross punches the pole. Ross then screams from the pain and turns to Gunther, and Gunther has a huge smile on his face.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You ducked!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm sorry! It was a reflex!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my god, this really hurts!!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I couldn't help it! When a fist comes at your face, you duck! Look! (He goes to punch Ross, expecting him to duck, but he doesn't and Joey punches Ross.   Gunther is amused.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What is the matter with you?!?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You were supposed to duck!!! Why didn't you duck?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why don't we talk about this on the way to the hospital?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Good, good yeah, (Grabs the bags) maybe while we're there, they can check your reflexes. (Joey opens the door and it hits Ross in the face with it.) (Makes quote marks.) "Oops."
Commercial Break
Ross and Rachel's, Emma is still crying.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Try feeding her again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I already fed her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know, that's why I said again!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Alright you guys, we can't turn on each other, Okay?  That's just what she wants.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (enters) Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Monica can I talk to you outside for a minute?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no, you guys, just stay here, I'm gonna go check her diaper, Pheebs you wanna come?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh I'm kinda part of this.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Actually Pheebs its more of a husband and wife kinda thing

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I knew I should have married Chandler.
Phoebe and Rachel go to the back room and Emma continues to cry in the background while Chandler and Monica talk.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay what's up

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Umm, you know how we always said that it would be fun to move to Paris for a year? You know, you could study French cooking and I could write and we could take a picnic along the Seine and go wine tasting in Bordeaux?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh yeah (smiles).

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, you know how that people say that Tulsa is the Paris of Oklahoma?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What? Who says that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: People who've never ever been to Paris.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We're moving to Tulsa! (Makes a excited expression on his face)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, Ms. McKenna, she kind of works above my boss, she asked me to move to Tulsa and be the president of our office there, and I was sleeping and apparently, said yes.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (stands up angry) Tulsa, Oklahoma!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The Sooner State, whatever that is.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, I don't even wanna see the musical Oklahoma!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really? Oh What A Beautiful Morning!  Surrey With A Fringe On Top.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you trying to tell me that we're moving to Oklahoma, or that you're gay? All right, not that this matters, but did they at least offer you a huge raise?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, no, but they are going to lease us a Ford Focus. (Monica's not impressed.) I'll get out of it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (hears Emma crying) What is wrong with Emma?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh she misunderstood, she thought she was moving to Tulsa.
Ms. McKenna's Office, Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Umm ma'am, do you have a minute? (She points for him to come in) I kind of have some bad news. I don't think I can move to Tulsa.

lines.speaker: Ms. McKenna
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's a funny story, actually. (coughs) I kind of fell asleep in the meeting this morning so when I said I'd move to Tulsa, I didn't really know what I was saying.

lines.speaker: Ms. McKenna
lines.text: You fell asleep?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But only because I was up all night worried about this meeting, ain't that funny? Irony? Not a fan, alright (he sits down). See, here's the thing. I went home and told my wife about Tulsa and she won't go. See, me, I love Tulsa!  Tulsa is heaven!  Tulsa is Italy-Please don't make me go there!

lines.speaker: Ms. McKenna
lines.text: Chandler, I...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No no no! Look, Carol, can I call you Carol? (Pause) Wh-why would I when your name is Elaine? Oh what a great picture of your son, strapping! (She glares at him.) That's a picture of your daughter, isn't it, well she's lovely. I like a girl with a strong jaw. I'll call you from Tulsa. (Exits.)
The Hospital, Joey is sitting in the lobby as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, so how is it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I broke my thumb.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Your thumb? That's weird. (Makes a fist.) You sure you're punching right? Make a fist. (Ross just looks at him with his thumb in a cast.) Maybe later. Ross I feel terrible.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You know what, you can go, I just have to fill out some forms. (Tries to hold the pen but can't)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You, you want me to help you with that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why, does it look like I'm having trouble with my misshapen claw? (He hands Joey the form)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Name? (Ross looks at him.) I know Ross but what's it short for? You know like, like Rossel or Rosstepher.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Just Ross!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's pretty, Okay date of birth?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You know my birthday.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure, May...tember.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: October 18th.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Occupation? Dinosaurs.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Actually I'm a palian... Dinosaurs is fine... the drawing is not.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Alright, who do you want as your emergency contact?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah, Rachel I guess.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, relationship, boy this could take a while.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Just ah... just put roommate.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on, you guys are more then that! I mean, you're gonna get together right?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't think that we are.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But you two were supposed to be together.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I thought so too, but then she said she'd marry you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on, Ross, that didn't mean anything! She just had the baby, she was all freaked out about doing it alone, she would have said yes to anybody.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah that's what she said.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So I don't wanna be just anybody.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You know what, it's, it's better this way anyway. I mean I don't know what I was thinking, going down that road again with us. It's just much easier if we're just friends who have a kid.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And you're Okay with that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes. I mean, it's what we always planned.  And if you have a plan, you should stick to it.  That's why they call them plans.  Hello? (Pause) I'm fine.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, for what it's worth, with Rachel I don't think you'll ever be just (Makes quote marks.) "anybody."

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey there you go! (Smiles because Joey used it correctly)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (makes quote marks) "Thanks."
Ross looks away, not bothering
Ross and Rachel's, Emma continues to cry.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! How long has she been crying?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: About a week and a half.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well alright, looks like you guys have got it under control so I'm just gonna go. (She gets up and Rachel looks at her, upset, and Monica just stares.) No! Really? Misery really does love company. All right! (She sits back down.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rach, try holding her a different way.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You guys, I'm doing the best I can, anyone else is welcome to try.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Alright, I'll try, fine! Yes, Okay!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Here you go. (Hands Emma to Phoebe)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Shh! Nothing works with this child! (Hands her back.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh god what am I gonna do you guys, I can't even comfort my own baby! I'm the worst mother ever!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're just new at this, it'll get better, think about your first day at work. I mean, that couldn't have been easy but you figured that out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah I don't think dressing provocatively is going to help me here! Oh my god just please take her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay I'll take her, here. (Takes Emma)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I have to go to the bathroom. (Goes to the bathroom)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I have to go scream into a pillow. (Goes to scream into a pillow)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Emma) Bouncy baby, Bouncy baby, Ooh baby baby, Ooh baby baby, Ooh baby baby. (Emma stops crying and falls asleep)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Have I gone deaf?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It worked! Ooh baby baby baby, ooh baby baby baby!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You must be a fireball in bed.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't believe it!  She's asleep!  I got her to go to sleep!   I have actual magical powers!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can hear traffic and birds!  I can hear the voices in my head again! (Monica looks at her strangely) I'm kidding. (She smiles wickedly.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! You got her to stop crying!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes I did, I'm Monica, Super Aunt

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You are the official baby crier stopper!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes I am!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You're never leaving the apartment!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Say what?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's your new job, day and night, she starts crying I need you here.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (stands up to hand Emma back) Oh no no no no!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thankfully you don't need me at all (gets up and to leave) so Okay Super aunt see you later! Rachel let's give it six to eight months (she leaves).

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay so listen I'm gonna go lay down.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know the book says that whenever she's sleeping I should be sleeping so... (She gives Monica thumbs and goes to lay down)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering, loudly) Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Shhh! We just got her to go to sleep

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh so there can't be any yelling.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We're moving to Tulsa

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (loudly) What!?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Shhhh! Shhhhh! Shhhhh! Shhhhh! (Walks backwards towards the door) I can't, I can't hear you. (He runs out)
Ross and Rachel's, Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Heeeeey, where have you been? (He shows her his thumb) What happened to you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ah I had a little thing with Joey, if you think this is bad you should see him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no Ross! This is not good, we have to talk about this Joey thing. Please sit. (He sits) You have got to get over this Joey thing, okay? I never really wanted to marry Joey, okay?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know what I really really want?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What, Rach?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I wanna sleep, I wanna eat, I wanna take a shower, I mean before she wakes up and we gotta do this all over again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (smiles) Right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I mean I got news for you mister, Emma?  Not easy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, that's what I'm here for. (Emma starts crying again) Want me to get that?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No its really okay... Monica!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (comes running out the kitchen to the bedroom) Got it! Got it! Got it! Got it! Got it! Got it!
Closing Credits
Central Perk, Joey and Ross are sitting at one of the high tables.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You know, ah, I've been thinking about this and I gotta tell ya, it's not my fault. It's a natural instinct.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (enters) Hey, what you guys talking about?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey OK great, what would you do if I did this? (Swings to punch Chandler, he moves and he ends up punching Ross, knocking him off the stool. Ross then gets up and just stares at Joey.)
End
